en: Tsunami warning: Severe earthquake shakes southern Philippines. The magnitude 7.8 quake causes several houses to collapse on the island of Mindanao. At least 19 people die. A video shows school children in panic.
la: Tsunami Monitum: Gravis terrae motus Philippines meridionali quatit. Magnitudo 7.8 commotionis varias domos in insula Mindanao construxit. Saltem XIX homines moriuntur. Video pueros in schola trepidos ostendit.

title: Heftiges Erdbeben auf Philippinen: Flaggenzeremonie am ersten Schultag rettete vielen Kindern das Leben
description: Das Beben der Stärke 7,8 traf vor allem die Stadt Santos City, wo die meisten der 19 Todesopfer verzeichnet wurden. Dutzende Menschen wurden außerdem verletzt. Mehrere Tsunamiwarnungen wurden weitgehend wieder aufgehoben.
content: Manila (APA/dpa) - Bei einem schweren Erdbeben auf den Philippinen sind nach Angaben des Zivilschutzes mindestens 19 Menschen ums Leben gekommen. 134 weitere wurden verletzt, wie der Direktor der Beh… [+3412 chars]
de: Heftiges Erdbeben auf Philippinen: Flaggenzeremonie am ersten Schultag rettete vielen Kindern das Leben. Das Beben der Stärke 7,8 traf vor allem die Stadt Santos City, wo die meisten der 19 Todesopfer verzeichnet wurden. Dutzende Menschen wurden außerdem verletzt. Mehrere Tsunamiwarnungen wurden weitgehend wieder aufgehoben.
en: Violent earthquake in Philippines: Flag ceremony on the first day of school saved many children's lives. The magnitude 7.8 quake primarily hit the city of Santos City, where most of the 19 deaths were recorded. Dozens of people were also injured. Several tsunami warnings have largely been lifted.
la: Terrae motus violentus in Philippinis: Caerimonia vexilla primo die scholae multas vitas natorum servavit. Magnitudo 7.8 commotio imprimis urbem Santos urbem percussit, ubi plurimae decem et novem funera scriptae sunt. Dozens etiam homines laesi sunt. Aliquot admonitiones tsunami late elevatae sunt.

en: At least 45 dead: People hope for help after earthquake in the Philippines. The 7.8 magnitude quake shook the island of Mindanao on Monday and caused severe damage in Sarangani province. Since then, many people have been without water, without food and without a roof over their heads.
la: Saltem 45 mortui: Homines auxilium sperant post terrae motum in Philippinis. 7.8 magnitudinis motus insulam Mindanao die Lunae concussit et grave damnum in provincia Sarangani fecit. Cum ergo multi sine aqua, sine cibo et sine tecto per capita.

en: Severe earthquake in the Philippines: the number of victims rises to 37. In the Philippines, emergency services continue to search for survivors after a devastating earthquake. However, the number of deaths is likely to rise. More than 1,000 aftershocks are also making rescue work more difficult.
la: Gravis terrae motus in Philippinis: numerus victimarum usque ad 37. In Philippinis officia repentina pergunt ad quaerendas residuos post terrae motum vastantem. Numerus tamen funerum oriri solet. Plus quam 1,000 aftershocks etiam laborem liberandum difficiliorem faciunt.

en: Mindanao Island: 37 dead and 480 injured after earthquake in the Philippines. One day after the severe earthquake in the Philippines, the extent of the disaster is becoming clearer. Dozens of people are dead, hundreds injured - and many are in shock.
la: Mindanao Island: 37 mortuus et 480 post terrae motus in Philippinis vulneratus. Una die post terraemotus magnus in Philippinis, amplitudo calamitatis clarior fit. Duo homines mortui sunt, centeni laesi sunt, et multi offenduntur.
